title: Congress Schedules CLARITY Act Hearing for July 17 in New York
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Congress Schedules CLARITY Act Hearing for July 17 in New York

Congress has scheduled a July 17 hearing in New York on the CLARITY Act as momentum builds for the crypto market structure bill.

This post Congress Schedules CLARITY Act Hearing for July 17 in New York first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Craig Raw Built One of Bitcoin’s Best Wallets for Free. Apple Might Kill It by June 30.
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Craig Raw Built One of Bitcoin’s Best Wallets for Free. Apple Might Kill It by June 30.

Apple may terminate Sparrow Wallet creator Craig Raw's developer account on June 30 after he submitted a warning app to combat fake Sparrow Wallet scams.

This post Craig Raw Built One of Bitcoin’s Best Wallets for Free. Apple Might Kill It by June 30. first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Bull Bitcoin Secures MiCA License in France, Preserving Full Self-Custody and Privacy Features
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bull Bitcoin Secures MiCA License in France, Preserving Full Self-Custody and Privacy Features

Founder Francis Pouliot announced the self-financed, three-year achievement, highlighting successful PASSI and DORA cybersecurity audits without outsourcing core infrastructure.

This post Bull Bitcoin Secures MiCA License in France, Preserving Full Self-Custody and Privacy Features first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Juan Galt.

title: European Union’s ESMA Orders Unlicensed Crypto Firms to Exit EU Market as MiCA Deadline Arrives
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

European Union’s ESMA Orders Unlicensed Crypto Firms to Exit EU Market as MiCA Deadline Arrives

ESMA ordered unlicensed crypto firms to stop serving EU clients and wind down operations before MiCA's July 1, 2026 authorization deadline.

This post European Union’s ESMA Orders Unlicensed Crypto Firms to Exit EU Market as MiCA Deadline Arrives first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: H100 Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Deal That Would Make It Europe’s No. 2 Listed Treasury
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

H100 Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Deal That Would Make It Europe’s No. 2 Listed Treasury

H100 shareholders approved a deal to acquire two Norwegian bitcoin treasury firms, a move that would boost the company's holdings to 3,500 BTC.

This post H100 Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Deal That Would Make It Europe’s No. 2 Listed Treasury first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: US Senate Passes Housing Bill With Four-Year Fed CBDC Ban
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

US Senate Passes Housing Bill With Four-Year Fed CBDC Ban

The U.S. Senate has passed a housing bill that includes a ban on a Federal Reserve-issued CBDC through 2030.

This post US Senate Passes Housing Bill With Four-Year Fed CBDC Ban first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
